verbGlossary.MAPPED TO: {source} classification element is cross-referenced to {target} taxonomy for standardized reporting (e.g., project cost code mapped to a MasterFormat division for industry-comparable breakdowns)
verbGlossary.ORGANIZED BY: {source} line items are structured according to {target} division or section hierarchy (e.g., budget line items organized by MasterFormat divisions for trade-level budgeting)
verbGlossary.CLASSIFIED UNDER: Cost record is categorized using {target} taxonomy (e.g., direct cost line item classified under a MasterFormat division to identify the trade responsible for the expenditure)
verbGlossary.STRUCTURED PER: {source} breakdown structure follows {target} hierarchical numbering scheme (e.g., WBS codes structured per the company WBS code standard for consistent project decomposition)
verbGlossary.CODED BY: {source} is assigned a classification code from {target} (e.g., budget line item coded by WBS code for work package tracking, direct cost coded by standard cost code)
verbGlossary.CHARGED TO: Cost amount is posted against a specific classification code in {target} structure (e.g., CCO line item amount charged to a WBS code for rework cost allocation)
verbGlossary.ALLOCATED AGAINST: {source} adjustment is distributed relative to {target} breakdown structure (e.g., budget modification allocated against a budget code to reallocate funds between categories)
verbGlossary.DERIVED FROM: Project-specific financial classification is created based on {target} master list (e.g., project cost codes derived from the company standard cost code list)
verbGlossary.SCOPED BY: {source} cost is defined in terms of {target} scope of work (e.g., change event line item scoped by specification section to tie cost to a spec requirement)
verbGlossary.REFERENCED AGAINST: {source} references {target} section for contract compliance verification (e.g., subcontract line item referenced against specification section to confirm scope alignment)
verbGlossary.BROKEN DOWN BY: {source} is decomposed according to {target} element classification (e.g., SOV broken down by UniFormat elements for element-based cost tracking)
verbGlossary.TAGGED TO: {source} is linked to {target} for cross-domain traceability (e.g., budget line item tagged to a UniFormat element for design-to-cost alignment)
verbGlossary.GOVERNED BY: {source} or contract is subject to {target} terms and conditions (e.g., subcontract governed by AIA A201 General Conditions for dispute resolution and payment terms)
verbGlossary.ESCALATED PER: {source} or dispute is formally escalated following {target} document's claim procedures (e.g., owner change order escalated per AIA contract claim provisions)
verbGlossary.ADMINISTERED PER: {source} process follows {target} document's prescribed administration procedures (e.g., commitment change order administered per AIA A201 change order provisions)
verbGlossary.REQUIRED BY: {source} document is mandated by {target} standard at specific project milestones (e.g., lien waiver required by AIA contract documents before payment release)
verbGlossary.FORMATTED PER: {source} or pay application follows the target delivery method's prescribed billing format (e.g., owner invoice formatted per the delivery method's schedule of values template)
verbGlossary.SEGMENTED BY: {source} is broken down by {target} for comparative analysis (e.g., change order rate segmented by delivery method to compare design-bid-build vs. design-build performance)
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKED TO: {source} is compared against {target} published industry thresholds (e.g., cost forecast benchmarked to AACE cost engineering norms for estimate accuracy classification)
verbGlossary.MEASURED AGAINST: {source} variance is evaluated relative to {target} acceptable tolerance bands (e.g., budget variance measured against AACE recommended contingency and accuracy ranges)
verbGlossary.CALCULATED PER: {source}performance metric is computed using {target} prescribed formula (e.g., Cost Performance Index calculated per AACE earned value methodology)
verbGlossary.SIZED PER: {source} reserve is established based on {target} risk-based sizing methodology (e.g., contingency sized per AACE recommended practice for estimate classification and risk assessment)
verbGlossary.PROVISIONED FOR: {source} includes a dedicated allocation to meet the target certification's compliance requirements (e.g., project budget provisioned for LEED certification commissioning and documentation costs)
verbGlossary.RESERVED FOR: {source} is set aside to cover anticipated costs driven by {target} requirements (e.g., allowance reserved for energy code compliance measures such as enhanced insulation or HVAC upgrades)
